title: Google Cloud App Engine Application
description: Represents an App Engine application resource, including its configuration, services, and serving status.

name.description: Full path to the Application resource in the API.

id.description: Identifier of the Application resource, equivalent to the project ID.

authDomain.description: Google Apps authentication domain that controls which users can access the application.

locationId.description: Location from which this application runs.

codeBucket.description: Google Cloud Storage bucket used to store application code.

defaultBucket.description: Google Cloud Storage bucket for default storage.

servingStatus.description: Current serving status of the application.

defaultHostname.description: Hostname used to reach this application.

gcrDomain.description: The Google Container Registry domain used for storing managed build docker images.

dispatchRules.description: HTTP path dispatch rules for requests to the application.
